betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Reactor Remote Control Block§f

§aRemotely control your research reactor — auto-adjust control rods for safe, efficient operation!§f

§bThe Reactor Remote Control Block§f remotely controls a research reactor's control rods based on parameters set in its GUI. Very similar to RBMK automatic control rods.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• Remote Control Block§f — Technetium Steel + CRT + Military Grade Circuit Board
§b• Reactor Remote Sensor§f — Tungsten Wire + Lead Plate + Magnetron + Integrated Circuit Board

§6Usage§f:
§b1.§f Right-click a functioning reactor with the Remote Sensor, then place it in the control block slot
§b2.§f The display shows: §eLeft§f = rod extension, §eMiddle§f = neutron flux, §eRight§f = core temperature
§b3.§f Set min/max temperature (blue buttons) and rod levels at those temperatures (yellow buttons)
§b4.§f Choose rod movement function: §bLinear§f, §bExponential§f, or §bLogarithmic§f
§b5.§f Save — rods will auto-adjust to match temperature on the graph

§6Features§f:
§b• Comparator output§f — emits signal proportional to reactor temperature (redstone alarms!)
§b• Maintains constant neutron rate§f for breeding
§b• Prevents overheating§f — rods react quickly to arrest runaway reactions
§b• Never exceeds rod limits§f even if temperature goes beyond set range

§eTip§f: A properly configured remote control block makes a reactor very safe to operate — it will react instantly if the reactor heats up too much. Essential for unattended breeding operations!
